slides.title: The one food in every *Blue Zone*
slides.sub: A daily cup of beans and lentils is the quiet staple shared by the world's longest-lived people.

slides.title: A humble longevity staple
slides.body: From Okinawa to Sardinia, the longest-lived communities all lean on legumes. A daily cup *shows up everywhere*.

slides.title: Steady, slow energy
slides.body: Beans and lentils are rich in slow-digesting fiber. That can support *steadier blood sugar* and fewer afternoon crashes.

slides.title: Plant protein that lasts
slides.body: A cup brings plant protein plus fiber, so you feel full longer. It is linked to *better appetite control*.

slides.title: Food for your microbes
slides.body: That same fiber feeds the gut bacteria tied to immunity and mood. Your microbiome *thrives on plants*.

slides.title: One simple cup a day
slides.body: Add lentils to soup, beans to a salad, hummus to lunch. Small, repeatable swaps *compound over years*.

slides.title: Build the *daily habits* that last
slides.body: Vibe Health logs your food, sleep, movement and steps, then turns them into one daily Health Score so good habits actually stick.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Every Blue Zone shares one quiet staple, and it is not a supplement. It is a daily cup of beans and lentils. 🌿🫘

Slow-digesting fiber and plant protein that steady your blood sugar and feed your gut, all from one simple habit. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns small daily habits into one clear score → link in bio.
